nodes.name: Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires Mon/Wed/Fri at 8am. Change to Webhook node if you want on-demand triggering.

nodes.name: Read Idea from Notion
nodes.notes: Pulls the highest-priority idea from your Notion content ideas DB. Requires NOTION_CONTENT_IDEAS_DB env var.

nodes.name: Strategy Agent — Brief + Pillar

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Strategy Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Read the agent instructions at .claude/agents/strategy-agent.md. Your job: classify the idea by content pillar and funnel stage, produce a content brief, and identify the core thesis and recommended formats. Output valid JSON only.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{ "role": "user", "content": "Produce a content brief for this idea: {{ $json.properties.Idea.title[0].plain_text }}. Context: {{ $json.properties.Notes.rich_text[0].plain_text }}" }]

nodes.notes: Calls Claude API with strategy-agent context. Returns JSON brief.

nodes.name: Wait — Jamaal Approves Angle
nodes.notes: Pipeline pauses here. Jamaal receives the brief via email/Notion and must hit the approval webhook to continue. This is a hard gate — no auto-advance.

parameters.subject: ITC Content OS — Angle Approval Needed: {{ $('strategy-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .slug }}
parameters.message:
New content brief ready for your angle approval

Pillar: {{ $('strategy-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .pillar }}

Funnel stage: {{ $('strategy-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .funnel_stage }}

Core thesis: {{ $('strategy-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .core_thesis }}

Recommended formats: {{ $('strategy-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .recommended_formats }}

Approve this angle →

If you want changes, reply to this email with your notes and the pipeline will not proceed until you re-approve.

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Content Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Follow .claude/agents/content-agent.md exactly. Produce: (1) LinkedIn post copy, (2) carousel outline with 7 slides including alt text, (3) 60-second video script. Run voice check rules from _context/voice-style-and-rules.md. Output valid JSON with keys: linkedin_post, carousel_outline, video_script, voice_check_score, voice_check_verdict.

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Inclusion Review Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Follow .claude/agents/inclusion-review-agent.md. Review all three assets for harmful framing, power dynamics gaps, and unsupported claims. Output valid JSON with keys: verdict (pass|revise|block), flags (array of strings), notes.

nodes.name: Block Check
nodes.notes: If inclusion review returns block, the pipeline stops. Jamaal is notified but nothing proceeds.

parameters.subject: ITC Content OS — Pipeline BLOCKED
parameters.message:
Pipeline blocked by inclusion review

Content was stopped before reaching you because inclusion review returned a BLOCK verdict.

Reason: {{ $('inclusion-review-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .notes }}

Flags: {{ $('inclusion-review-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .flags | join(', ') }}

To restart: fix the flagged issues in the original brief and re-trigger the pipeline.

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Growth Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Follow .claude/agents/growth-agent.md. Set the CTA, assign a calendar slot (next available Mon/Wed/Fri), define the CRM segment, and list repurpose options. Output valid JSON with keys: cta, calendar_slot, crm_segment, repurpose_options.

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Governance Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Follow .claude/agents/governance-agent.md. Verify the full pipeline ran: brief, voice check, inclusion review (pass), growth metadata. Output valid JSON with keys: status (reviewed|blocked), checklist (object of booleans), notes.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{ "role": "user", "content": "Run final governance check. Brief: {{ $('strategy-agent').item.json.content[0].text }}. Voice: {{ $('content-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .voice_check_verdict }}. Inclusion: {{ $('inclusion-review-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .verdict }}. Growth: {{ $('growth-agent').item.json.content[0].text }}." }]

nodes.name: Run Design + Video in Parallel
nodes.notes: Design-agent (Canva) and video-agent (HeyGen) run as parallel HTTP requests below.

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Design Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Follow .claude/agents/design-agent.md. Use your Canva MCP tools to produce carousel slides from the outline. Return a JSON object with keys: canva_design_urls (array), export_urls (array), accessibility_verified (boolean), error (string or null).

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{ "role": "user", "content": "Produce carousel slides from this outline: {{ $('content-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .carousel_outline }}" }]

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Video Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Follow .claude/agents/video-agent.md. Use your HeyGen MCP tools to produce an avatar video from the script. Return a JSON object with keys: heygen_video_id, video_url, captions_enabled (boolean), duration_seconds, error (string or null).

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{ "role": "user", "content": "Produce a 60-second avatar video from this script: {{ $('content-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .video_script }}" }]

parameters.name: system
parameters.value: You are the Delivery Agent for Inclusive Tech Club Growth Content OS. Follow .claude/agents/delivery-agent.md. Package all outputs and produce the structured approval bundle. Output valid JSON with keys: approval_bundle (full markdown string), slug, all_assets_ready (boolean), flags (array).

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{ "role": "user", "content": "Package approval bundle. Copy: {{ $('content-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .linkedin_post }}. Carousel: {{ $('design-agent').item.json.content[0].text }}. Video: {{ $('video-agent').item.json.content[0].text }}. Growth: {{ $('growth-agent').item.json.content[0].text }}. Governance: {{ $('governance-agent').item.json.content[0].text }}." }]

parameters.subject: ITC Content OS — Ready for Your Review: {{ $('delivery-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .slug }}
parameters.message:
Content bundle ready for your review

The full pipeline ran. Everything below is a draft — only you can approve.

{{ $('delivery-agent').item.json.content[0].text | parseJSON | .approval_bundle }}

Approve →  Request Changes  Block

setup_notes: Set these environment variables in n8n before activating:
NOTION_CONTENT_IDEAS_DB — Notion database ID for content ideas
N8N_APPROVAL_WEBHOOK_URL — URL of the publish workflow webhook
N8N_DELIVERY_WEBHOOK_URL — URL of this workflow's delivery endpoint
